articles.title: Sensex, Nifty wobbly; Hind Zinc, SBI, Force Motors most active

articles.title: Moneycontrol Exclusive: Govt plans overhaul of tax administration for smooth GST rollout
articles.summary: The government has readied plans for a major change in Indiaâs tax administration structure, including overhauling the Central Board of Excise and Customs (CBEC) to ensure a glitch-free roll-out of a nation-wide goods and services tax (GST).
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Bond bull market may pause but is far from over: Expert
articles.summary: The benchmark 10-year government-security yield remained stuck in 8-7.5 percent range through all of 2015 and half of 2016, moving lower to sub-7 percent only when the RBI promised in April to reduce the system's liquidity deficit. The yield may now fall more.
articles.label: BEARISH

Research based on World Bank data has predicted that the proportion of jobs threatened in India by automation is 69 percent, in China it is 77 percent and in Ethiopia, the percentage of jobs threatened
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Scope for meaningful rate cuts going ahead: Neelkanth Mishra
articles.summary: Credit Suisse' Neelkanth Mishra expects repo rate to fall to a decade low in the coming quarters. He says that beginning December the market may see a robust and widespread pick-up which may boost indices.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Cautiously optimistic on India; eyeing earnings revival: Sanger
articles.summary: Global liquidity tailwinds are unlikely to get any better from now and that makes Arvind Sanger, Managing Partner at Geosphere Capital Management âcautiously optimisticâ on the Indian markets.

articles.title: Endurance Technologies IPO opens: Should you subscribe?
articles.summary: The Aurangabad-based company aims to mop up nearly Rs 1,162 crore (at higher end of price band) by diluting 17.5 percent stake through the issue that will close on October 7. It already raised Rs 348.52 crore through anchor investors' portion on Tuesday, the day before issue opening.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Top Gainers & Losers on June 9: Gabriel India, OLA, Pine Labs, Bank of Baroda, Redington, Paytm among top gainers
articles.summary: The Indian stock market rebounded with gains led by financial stocks and a drop in crude oil prices. The Nifty and Sensex rose 0.61% and 0.55%, respectively. The RBI's new forex measures supported sentiment, but both indices still face significant year-to-date losses.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Sensex snaps 2-day losing run, ends 395 points higher: 10 key highlights from Indian stock market today
articles.summary: After trading on a choppy note for most of the session, the BSE barometer Sensex closed at 73,919, up 395 points or 0.54%. Its NSE counterpart, Nifty 50, ended the day 119 points or 0.52% higher at 23,242.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: FirstCry-backed Swara Baby eyes filing for $100 million IPO this month
articles.summary: The disposable hygiene products manufacturer, backed by FirstCry, is expected to file draft papers within 10-15 days. The issue will likely comprise fresh shares and an OFS.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Sebi eyes market making framework for commodity derivatives to improve liquidity
articles.summary: Sebi is considering a market-making framework to boost liquidity in longer-dated commodity derivatives, helping businesses hedge future price risks more effectively. The move aims to reduce dependence on near-expiry contracts, improve price discovery and deepen India's commodity markets.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Genxai Analytics IPO Day 3: GMP signals 5% listing gains; check subscription status and other details
articles.summary: Genxai Analytics IPO, closing today, has received strong investor interest. The ₹55 crore offering includes 0.47 crore shares priced between ₹110 and ₹116, mainly targeting working capital and development expenses.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: SpaceX IPO: Can Indian investors buy stake in Elon Musk’s company in $75 billion public issue
articles.summary: SpaceX is debuting on Nasdaq on 12 June with shares priced at $135, potentially raising $75 billion. Up to 25% of shares could go to retail investors, but direct access may be restricted for investors from several countries, including India.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Top defence stocks to buy now: HAL, Zen Technologies, Bharat Electronics, Apollo Micro in Choice Broking’s list
articles.summary: According to Choice Institutional Equities, India's defence sector is poised for growth with robust order books and increasing local production. Key companies such as HAL, BEL, and Zen Technologies are well-positioned to benefit from military preparedness and government support.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: JNK India shares surge over 17% to 15-month high after securing international order
articles.summary: JNK India shares surged 17.22% to ₹489.40 after winning a significant order from CC7 Emirates Engineering for waste gas handling systems. The contract, categorized as large, is estimated between ₹100 crore and ₹300 crore.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Copper Resumes Gains as Mideast Tensions Ease, Stocks Rebound
articles.summary: Copper resumed its advance along with other industrial metals as tensions eased in the Middle East, boosting risk appetite.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.summary: Ipca stock’s valuation seem reasonable relative to its earnings potential over the next few years. They trade at around 30 times its FY27 estimated earnings

articles.title: Adani Energy Solutions to acquire IntelliSmart for ₹3,050 crore
articles.summary: Adani Energy Solutions share price has gained 16% in one month, and has rallied 60% in three months. The Adani Group stock has jumped 74% in one year, while it has surged 89% over the past three years.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: UHM Vacation IPO allotment finalised: Latest GMP, steps-by-step guide to check allotment status online for SME IPO
articles.summary: The UHM Vacation IPO was open for subscription from June 4-8, 2025, and is set for allotment today. Shares are anticipated to list on June 11 at around ₹166. Subscription was 2.36 times, with retail bids at 3.86 times.

articles.title: Stocks to buy: Arvind, Nitin Spinners, Sanathan Textiles - Emkay bullish on three textile stocks

articles.title: IndiGo share price jumps over 4% after brokerages maintain bullish view on the aviation stock
articles.summary: InterGlobe Aviation shares rose over 4% on 9 June after brokerages endorsed a positive outlook following its Investor Day. Analysts focus on IndiGo's long-term growth strategies, including ambitious passenger and fleet expansion targets for FY30, despite short-term challenges like rising fuel costs.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Mazagon Dock, Cochin Shipyard to GRSE: Defence Shipbuilding stocks rise amid multi-year growth forecast
articles.summary: Garden Reach Shipbuilders gained over 2% to hit the day's peak of ₹2,666.60 on the National Stock Exchange (NSE). Mazagon Dock also added over 2% to ₹2,442.50, and Cochin Shipyard added 1.8% to ₹1,432.60 apiece.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: CMR Green Technologies IPO listing tomorrow: What GMP signals ahead of market debut
articles.summary: CMR Green Technologies, a leader in aluminium and zinc recycling, launched a ₹630.88 crore IPO, which was oversubscribed 127.07 times. The shares are scheduled to debut on June 10, with a potential listing price of ₹262, reflecting strong investor demand.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Vahh Chemicals IPO allotment date likely today. GMP, steps to check share allotment status online for SME IPO
articles.summary: Vahh Chemicals IPO allotment date is likely today, June 9. Vahh Chemicals IPO allotment status online check can be done through the websites of BSE and the IPO registrar. Kfin Technologies is the Vahh Chemicals IPO registrar.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Is the global IT stock rout a wake-up call for AI optimists?
articles.summary: Investors are wondering how long it will take for AI-related investments to convert into substantial IT revenue growth and whether large global IT stocks are overvalued.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Bonus share alert! Hardwyn India announces 2:5 bonus issue, record date awaited - small-cap stock jumps 2%
articles.summary: Hardwyn India plans a 2:5 bonus share issue, pending shareholder approval at an upcoming EGM. The company aims to issue around 19.54 crore shares. The record date for determining shareholder eligibility for the 2:5 bonus issue has not yet been announced.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: ICICI Bank pips Reliance Industries to become second-largest weighted stock in Nifty 50 despite smaller market cap
articles.summary: Reliance Industries commands the highest overall market capitalisation of nearly ₹17.14 lakh crore on the NSE, its free-float market capitalisation stands at a little over ₹8.52 lakh crore. As a result, the company currently holds an 8.27% weight in the Nifty 50 index.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Copper Falls With Rate Hike Prospects, AI Stocks Risk in Focus
articles.summary: Copper declined as expectations for a US rate hike and risks around artificial intelligence stocks reduced appetite for industrial metals.

articles.title: Hexagon Nutrition IPO Day 3: Issue subscribed 10.98x so far. Check GMP, issue details, key dates. Apply or not?
articles.summary: The Hexagon Nutrition IPO, open from June 5 to June 9, saw strong demand, with 10.98x subscription by day 3. The price band is set at ₹42-45, and the offering is valued at ₹138.87 crore, mostly as an offer-for-sale.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: IDFC First Bank to ICICI Bank, SBI: Nifty Bank jumps over 1% as RBI swap facility lifts bank shares
articles.summary: The RBI's new swap facility aims to lower hedging costs for banks on foreign borrowings, enhancing liquidity. Despite recent gains, analysts suggest caution as the Bank Nifty remains volatile within a broad trading range.
articles.label: BULLISH
